about.content:

catalog_item_1.title: 相册目录第一项
catalog_item_1.description:
Premium dual-channel fluid illumination systems designed exclusively for Sign Shops worldwide.

Factory-direct customization from China's precision signage engineering hub.
Patented kinetic independent control — smooth fluid motions with zero lighting dead zones.
Fully shipped via Pre-Wired Raceway Systems — Plug & Play on-site to slash 40% of your local installation labor costs.

Drop your vector design files (AI/PDF/SVG) below for a free 3D fluid animation rendering.
catalog_item_1.price_display: Quote on request — engineered per project
